lender_name.label: Lender Name
lender_name.description: Full legal name of the lender (bank/NBFC/individual)

borrower_name.label: Borrower Name
borrower_name.description: Full legal name of the borrower

loan_amount.label: Loan Amount (INR)
loan_amount.description: Principal amount of the loan in INR

interest_rate.label: Interest Rate (% per annum)
interest_rate.description: Annual interest rate as a percentage

repayment_schedule.label: Repayment Schedule
repayment_schedule.description: Description of how the loan will be repaid

loan_purpose.label: Purpose of Loan
loan_purpose.description: Specific purpose for which the loan is being taken

security_description.label: Security / Collateral
security_description.description: Description of security or collateral provided (if any)
